## Summary

What does this change do? Link related issues if any.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, API, deploy, or layout changed
- [ ] No secrets, `.env*`, or personal `books.csv` committed
- [ ] Scope is focused — one logical change
- [ ] Architecture considered ([system-overview](docs/architecture/system-overview.md) if touching `backend/`)

## Notes for reviewer

Anything non-obvious: trade-offs, follow-ups, things you skipped on purpose.
